title: Flutter Apps - Hardcoded Colors & Theme Violations Audit

violations.code: Color get primaryDark => Color.lerp(seedColor, const Color(0xFF101010), 0.30)!;
style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 16, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),

recommendations: Create a centralized color constants file (e.g., app_colors.dart) for all theme colors
Use BpColors or theme system instead of Colors.xxx throughout the codebase
Replace .shade* usage with theme-aware color properties
Implement withOpacity() values in theme system as named constants
Create status/state color mappings in a dedicated service
Use TextStyle from theme instead of hardcoded color properties
Standardize button colors through ButtonStyle theming
Remove hardcoded hex colors and use theme palette instead
